# Goodly Development

## Overview

Goodly Development delivers software product development, managed IT, and web platform services.
The business supports teams that need reliable implementation, ongoing technical operations, and modern web performance.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://goodlydevelopment.com/
- IT services: https://goodlydevelopment.com/it-services
- Web services: https://goodlydevelopment.com/web-services
- Support portal: https://goodlydevelopment.com/support
- Blog: https://goodlydevelopment.com/blog

## Operating Scope

- Product development, automations, and integrations
- Managed IT infrastructure and endpoint support
- WordPress/Webflow/web app development
- Performance, security, and maintenance operations

## Contact

- Email: jordan@goodlydevelopment.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jordan-allen-gd/

## Machine-Readable Endpoints

- robots: https://goodlydevelopment.com/robots.txt
- sitemap: https://goodlydevelopment.com/sitemap.xml
- blog index JSON: https://goodlydevelopment.com/content/blog-index.json
